name: 頒獎典禮身份揭露
description: Ashley以Victoria身份登上舞台，聚光燈下揭穿冒充者，台下的Cora驚恐萬狀。舞台與觀眾席的空間對比強化了權力反轉的視覺衝擊。
tags: 被害者登上最高舞台反轉為審判者

examples.drama_title: love drama "I was tricked into marrying a blind CEO I didn't know" HD FULL, CEO,ENGSUB,  Episodes
examples.excerpt: Who's that on the stage? Isn't this Kora? No, Cora is sitting in the audience. / I stand here today because someone plagiarized my work and tried to steal my life.
examples.context: 被害者登上最高舞台反轉為審判者
